prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-5PCCOTTONDISHTOWELS-BLU Product Type: TOWEL Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 5pc 100% Cotton Oversized Dish Towel Set Kitchen Accessories, 28 x 22 Inches (3 Colors) (Blue) Description: Refresh your kitchen staples with Beille’s 5pc 100% Cotton Oversized Dish Towel Sets, a perfect blend of modern, timeless design and practical utility. Each set includes five beautifully coordinated towel patterns in one of three color palettes: Nautical Blue, Earthstone Brown or Lemongrass Yellow. Whether you're looking to add a subtle touch of color, or gift a well-loved kitchen essential, these tea towel sets from Beille make a statement through their simplicity and quality.

Crafted from 100% cotton, and featuring a woven, linen-like texture, these towels are absorbent enough to handle daily duty, while simultaneously look stylish and contemporary draped over an oven hanging bar or sink. Their oversized dimensions (28 x 22 inches), make them as useful for cleanup as they are for kitchen décor; use one as a bread cover, another for hand drying, and keep a few more folded and ready for guests or to replace used towels.

Perfect for gifting or refreshing your kitchen linen drawer, this five piece cotton tea towel set brings together practicality, color, and modern style, all in one thoughtfully crafted bundle! These sets are ideal for those who value thoughtful, clean design, muted tones and the joy of everyday rituals done right. Search Terms: dish towel set; kitchen towel set; tea towels; kitchen essentials basics accessories; hostess gift; food meal prep; kitchen and table linens; housewarming gifts new home; farmhouse cottage core nautical decor; sourdough bread baking supplies; cooking Features: - 5PC DISH TOWEL SET: Each set features five distinct patterns in a coordinated color palette, perfect for a curate kitchen aesthetic; choose from Earthstone Brown, Lemongrass Yellow or Nautical Blue tea towels sets - OVERSIZED DESIGN: Measuring 28 x 22 inches, these oversized kitchen towel sets are generously sized, offering more surface area for drying, wiping or displaying in different areas throughout the kitchen; each towel includes a discreet hanging hook sewn into the hem for hanging display if desired - 100% COTTON: Made from 100% cotton, these high quality towels are ultra absorbent, soft to the touch and durable enough for everyday use; perfect for drying dishes, covering baked goods or styling a stovetop - KITCHEN DÉCOR: Stylish patterns make these dish towel sets a beautiful accent in any kitchen; there’s a look to complement any kitchen aesthetic, whether you prefer cozy farmhouse charm or clean contemporary style - MACHINE WASHABLE: Beille’s dish towels are machine washable on a cold cycle with like colors; lay flat to dry and iron or steam as needed === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 5-pc 28x22 Blue Oversized Cotton Dish Towels

openai.item_name: Beille 5-pk 28x22 in Blue Dish Towel Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 100 Cotton, Ultra Absorbent, Woven Linen Texture, Machine Washable, Hanging Loop

openai.title_differentiation: 5-Piece Set, 100 Cotton, Oversized 28X22 Inch Towels, Highly Absorbent, Hanging Loop, Machine Washable
